heading: Securities issued by Bank as exempt securities; reports filed with Security and Exchange Commission
label: 286k–1 Securities issued by Bank as exempt securities; reports filed with Security and Exchange Commission
notes: Amendments1989—Subsec. (b). struck out subsec. (b) which related to contents of National Advisory Council reports provided for in .Pub. L. 101–240section 286b of this title
amendments: Amendments1989—Subsec. (b). struck out subsec. (b) which related to contents of National Advisory Council reports provided for in .Pub. L. 101–240section 286b of this title

children.label: a
children.text: Any securities issued by International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (including any guaranty by the bank, whether or not limited in scope), and any securities guaranteed by the bank as to both principal and interest, shall be deemed to be exempted securities within the meaning of subsection (a)(2) of , and subsection (a)(12) of . The bank shall file with the Securities and Exchange Commission such annual and other reports with regard to such securities as the Commission shall determine to be appropriate in view of the special character of the bank and its operations and necessary in the public interest or for the protection of investors.section 77c of title 15section 78c of title 15
